ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department and its offerings */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_levels" (
  "degree_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree level */,
  "degree_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree level (e.g., Diploma, Associate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the degree level */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Number of years required to complete the degree level */,
  "minimum_credits" INTEGER /* Minimum number of credits required for the degree level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the degree */,
  "degree_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the level of the degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the degree and its requirements */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Description of prerequisites for the degree */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Description of admission requirements for the degree */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits required for the degree */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the degree program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the degree program */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the degree can be completed online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_degree_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("degree_level_id") REFERENCES degree_levels ("degree_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the certificate */,
  "certificate_name" TEXT /* Name of the certificate or PMC */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the certificate or PMC */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Description of prerequisites for the certificate */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Description of admission requirements for the certificate */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits required for the certificate */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the certificate program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the certificate program */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the certificate can be completed online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree program */,
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certificate program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the enrollment occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "enrollment_type" TEXT /* Type of enrollment (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected date of graduation */,
  "tuition_fees" TEXT /* Total tuition fees for the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_degree_id FOREIGN KEY ("degree_id") REFERENCES degrees ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("certificate_id") REFERENCES certificates ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (e.g., enrolled, graduated, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the faculty member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Educational qualifications of the faculty member */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the degree program the course is part of */,
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the certificate program the course is part of */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Description of prerequisites for the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is elective */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("certificate_id") REFERENCES certificates ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_degree_id FOREIGN KEY ("degree_id") REFERENCES degrees ("degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "course_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the enrollment occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses_faculty" (
  "course_faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-faculty association */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the faculty member in the course (e.g., instructor, assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_faculty_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_faculty_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_history" (
  "enrollment_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment history entry */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed, withdrawn) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_history_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "course_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the course is offered (e.g., Monday, Wednesday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment_history" (
  "course_enrollment_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment history entry */,
  "course_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course enrollment (e.g., active, completed, withdrawn) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_enrollment_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_history_course_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_enrollment_id") REFERENCES course_enrollments ("course_enrollment_id")
)
